types: type CreateTaskInput = { title: string; description?: string; assigneeId?: string }
type Task = { id: string; title: string; status: 'todo' | 'in_progress' | 'done'; assigneeId?: string; createdAt: string }
type TaskPatch = { title?: string; status?: 'todo' | 'in_progress' | 'done'; assigneeId?: string }
type TaskQuery = { status?: string; assigneeId?: string; page?: number; pageSize?: number }
type CreateUserInput = { email: string; name?: string; role?: 'user' | 'admin' }
type Credentials = { email: string; password: string }
type Session = { id: string; userId: string; issuedAt: string; expiresAt: string }
type Assignment = { taskId: string; userId: string; assignedAt: string }
type User = { id: string; email: string; name?: string; role: 'user' | 'admin' }
routes: PATCH /api/tasks/:id -> updateTask(id: string, patch: TaskPatch): Promise<Task>
POST /api/tasks/:id/assign -> assignTask(taskId: string, userId: string): Promise<Assignment>
